title: Stock News Scraper - Finviz
description: Enter one or more stock ticker symbols to get recent news with full article text. Try it now with the prefilled AAPL ticker, then click Start. See the full guide for tips on getting the best results.

tickers.title: Ticker Symbols
tickers.description: Enter one or more stock ticker symbols, separated by commas. Examples: AAPL, TSLA, MSFT, NVDA, AMZN.

maxArticles.title: Max Articles Per Ticker
maxArticles.description: Maximum number of articles to return per ticker. Finviz stores up to 100 recent articles per ticker. Set to 0 for no limit.
maxArticles.sectionDescription: Fine-tune how many articles to scrape and whether to extract full article text.

daysBack.title: Days Back
daysBack.description: Only include articles published within the last N days. Set to 0 to include all available articles.

scrapeFullText.title: Extract Full Article Text
scrapeFullText.description: Visit each article URL and extract the full text as clean markdown. When disabled, only headlines and metadata are returned (much faster, lower cost).
